title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on X Drake, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: X Drake
dialogue.text: It's X Drake, one of the flying six!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the guy who rampaged through the flower capital recently!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Amidst all the chaos...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: X Drake-san why did you do that to the numbers!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyone who have

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just now, he transformed into a dinosaur!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Isn't he an executive? Something feels off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey X Drake!! Why would you take out the numbers!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy- San is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's your friend... He feels very close but

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's your enemy, it feels like he is out of reach

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's that kind of person!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What is that even supposed to mean?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's because Luffy-san has the ability to attract people to him

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huffe... Huff... i know who you are

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you want to take down KAIDOU!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't tell you my reasons but......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My goal aligns with yours

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't play such ridiculous games with us right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!! This is a guy who bent his knee to Kaido, just like Hawkins!.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've been driven out of that position!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you've decided to stick with us now, is that it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't trust a fickle bastard like this guy!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare get close to luffy!! x-drake, there is such a thing as HONOUR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: even in the pirate world.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's fine, he's an ally.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Not fine, at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shut your trap captain!! You blocked!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Mr. Strawhat!! Let's head into the castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I guess this was to be expected

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The man with the strawhat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It looks like he's the one

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Leading those pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That guy from earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't allow those two to get close to mister strawhat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Outta the way, you Samura!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Woah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the duo from before!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The dinosaur from the flower capital... is standing next to such a beauty! Who is she?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: STrawhat!!! Don't think you'll ever

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Face Kaido a second time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Instant kill- Green Star"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Exploding skull plant"!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
